items.name: Aria Networks
items.description: Aria Networks provides AI-driven network automation and optimization solutions compatible with SONiC environments.

items.name: Asterfusion Data Technologies
items.description: Asterfusion designs white-box switches running SONiC, targeting cloud and data-center operators seeking open-networking alternatives.

items.name: Aviz Networks
items.description: Aviz Networks delivers vendor-agnostic SONiC solutions including the ONES orchestration suite, Network Copilot, and Fabric Test Automation Suite (FTAS).

items.name: BE Networks
items.description: BE Networks delivers enhanced open-networking solutions based on SONiC for enterprise customers.

items.name: Denvr Dataworks
items.description: Denvr Dataworks operates GPU-as-a-service cloud infrastructure leveraging SONiC for high-performance AI fabric networking.

items.name: Dorado Software
items.description: Dorado Software provides network management and analytics tools that integrate with SONiC-based open-networking environments.

items.name: Edgecore Networks
items.description: Edgecore Networks is a leading ODM for open white-box switches from 1G to 800G, offering platforms certified to run SONiC distributions.

items.name: Hedgehog
items.description: Hedgehog builds the Open Network Fabric, a Kubernetes-native open-source networking platform powered by SONiC for edge and distributed-cloud environments.

items.name: iA Cloud
items.description: iA Cloud is a South Korean cloud and networking solutions provider contributing to SONiC adoption in Asia-Pacific enterprise markets.

items.name: Juniper Networks
items.description: Juniper Networks integrates SONiC support into its QFX switching portfolio and participates in the SONiC Foundation as a General Member.

items.name: Larch Networks
items.description: Larch Networks delivers disaggregated networking solutions and professional services for SONiC-based data-center deployments.

items.name: Micas Networks
items.description: Micas Networks manufactures open white-box switches from 1G to 800G validated with SONiC, targeting hyperscale and enterprise fabrics.

items.name: Netweb Technologies
items.description: Netweb Technologies is an Indian IT infrastructure company expanding SONiC adoption across the South Asian enterprise market.

items.name: PalCNetworks
items.description: PalCNetworks delivers networking solutions and integration services built on open platforms including SONiC.

items.name: PANTHEON.tech
items.description: PANTHEON.tech is a European open-networking software company offering SONiC expertise services and the SandWork network orchestration platform.

items.name: PLVision
items.description: PLVision specialises in custom SONiC distributions, SAI Challenger testing, and end-to-end SONiC integration for OEMs, ODMs, and enterprises.

items.name: STORDIS
items.description: STORDIS is The Open Networking Expert, distributing Enterprise SONiC and providing MONSOON monitoring, SONiC bootcamps, and Open2Support SLAs.

items.name: Sumitomo Electric Industry
items.description: Sumitomo Electric brings optical and network hardware expertise to the SONiC ecosystem, supporting open-networking adoption globally.
